name: Cannagistics Inc.
summary: Cannagistics Inc. engages in the e-commerce transportation and logistics business for third parties. The company provides less-than-truckload (LTL) and third-party logistics (3PL) carrier services, including regional, inter-regional, and national LTL and 3PL services. Its services include arranging for ground and air expedited transportation, and consumer household pickup and delivery. The company also offers value-added services, such as truckload brokerage, supply chain consulting and warehousing, and pick and ship services. The company was formerly known as Precious Investments, Inc. and changed its name to Cannagistics Inc. in May 2019. Cannagistics Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Mississauga, Canada.
